_publications._publicationTitle: The development of the PlexiQoL: A patient-reported outcome measure for adults with neurofibromatosis type 1-associated plexiform neurofibromas.

_contextSnippet: All sections in the comparator measures were moderately highly correlated with PlexiQoL scores indicating their influence on QoL.
details: Moderate to high correlations with NHP sections (0.52-0.72) and SF-36 domains (0.49-0.68)
